name: Kaladin
description: A battle medic turned slave turned Knight Radiant. Windrunner of the order of the Knights Radiant.

name: Shallan Davar
description: A young scholar from House Davar. Travels to meet Princess Jasnah to become her ward.

name: Dalinar Kholin
description: Highprince of House Kholin. The Bondsmith, known as the Blackthorn.

name: Adolin Kholin
description: Dalinar's eldest son. A talented duelist and warrior, known for his charisma and style.

name: Jasnah Kholin
description: Princess of Alethkar and renowned scholar. Discoverer of the Knights Radiant secrets.

name: Renarin Kholin
description: Younger son of Dalinar Kholin. A Truthwatcher of the Knights Radiant who sees the future.

name: Elhokar Kholin
description: King of Alethkar, son of Gavilar Kholin. A paranoid but well-meaning ruler struggling to fill his father's shoes.

name: Szeth
description: The Assassin in White. A Skybreaker from Shinovar forced to obey whoever holds his oathblade.

name: Navani Kholin
description: Widow of King Gavilar, mother of Jasnah. A brilliant scholar and engineer of fabrials and anti-light.

name: Sigzil / Nomad
description: A former Knight Radiant of the Skybreakers turned worldhopper known as Nomad. Once a member of Bridge Four and Hoid's apprentice, he wanders the Cosmere bearing a Dawnshard.

name: Venli
description: A singer who becomes a Knight Radiant of the order of Willshapers.

name: Taravangian
description: King of Kharbranth. A complex figure who becomes the new Vessel of Odium.

name: Lift
description: A young Radiant who can use stormlight to fuel her abilities in unusual ways.

name: Taln
description: Herald of War. The Unbroken. Endured millennia of torture on Braize without breaking.

name: Ash (Shalash)
description: Herald of Beauty. Known for destroying artwork depicting herself.

name: Nale
description: Herald of Justice. Leader of the Skybreaker order.

name: Vin
description: A street urchin from Luthadel who discovers she is a Mistborn. Joins Kelsier to overthrow the Lord Ruler.

name: Kiin
description: Sarene's uncle. A former pirate and restaurateur in Kae who plays a key role in the Elantris resistance.

name: Kelsier
description: The Survivor of Hathsin. A Mistborn who leads the rebellion against the Lord Ruler.

name: Mare
description: Kelsier's late wife. A skaa woman who was executed in the Pits of Hathsin.

name: Reen
description: Vin's older half-brother. A cruel and abusive figure from Vin's past.

name: Elend Venture
description: Heir to House Venture and later king. A philosopher and idealist who dreams of democracy.

name: Sazed
description: A Terris Keeper, scholar and feruchemist. Serves as advisor and bearer of religious knowledge.

name: Marsh
description: Kelsier's older brother. Dedicated to the skaa rebellion. Later becomes a Steel Inquisitor.

name: The Lord Ruler
description: The immortal ruler of the Final Empire. His true identity and origins are shrouded in mystery.

name: Spook
description: A young Tineye from Kelsier's crew. Known for his loyalty and quiet nature.

name: Waxillium Ladrian
description: A Mistborn and lawman from the Roughs. Inherits the title of lord of House Ladrian.

name: Wayne
description: Wax's partner. An eccentric feruchemist with a talent for disguises and thievery.

name: Marasi Colms
description: Steris's half-sister. A student of the law and Mistborn, seeking justice in Elendel.

name: Steris Harms
description: Waxillium's fiancée. A meticulous, organized, and surprisingly brave woman.

name: Sylphrena
description: An honorspren bonded to Kaladin. She is his conscience, guide, and friend.

name: TenSoon
description: A kandra of the Third Generation who helps Vin and eventually gains his freedom.

name: Raoden
description: Prince of Arelon, transformed by the Shaod of Elantris. Finds purpose among the fallen.

name: Torol Sadeas
description: Highprince of Alethkar. A cunning and ruthless political rival of Dalinar Kholin.

name: Sarene
description: Princess of Teod. Intelligent and diplomatic. Arrives in Arelon for a political marriage.

name: Wan ShaiLu
description: A master Forger from Sel, skilled in the art of soulforging.

name: Hrathen
description: A high priest of Fjordell sent to convert Arelon. Fierce in his faith but tormented by doubt.

name: Vasher
description: Kalad the Usurper. A warrior skilled in Awakening who carries a sentient sword.

name: Nightblood
description: A sentient sword forged with the purpose of destroying evil. Dangerously literal.

name: Siri
description: The younger princess of Idris, unexpectedly sent to T'Telir in her sister's place.

name: Vivenna
description: Princess of Idris, trained from childhood to save her kingdom by marrying the god-king.

name: Susebron
description: The God-King of T'Telir, whose breath is the key to Nalthis's power.

name: Lightsong
description: A god of the Court of Gods who doubts his own purpose and seeks answers.

name: Khriss
description: A scholar from Taldain who studies the investiture systems of the Cosmere.

name: Kenton
description: A sand master of Taldain, the last of the Diem.

name: Hoid
description: A mysterious wanderer who appears throughout the Cosmere. Tells stories and seeks something he lost.

name: Silence Montane
description: A shadow hunter and innkeeper on Threnody, fighting to survive in a world of deadly shades.

name: Nazh
description: A mysterious collector of maps and information who works for Khriss.

name: Tress
description: A young woman from a remote island who crosses spore seas to rescue her love.

name: Charlie
description: A boy from the Rock who Tress sets out to rescue. Cursed and sent to the Sorceress's island.

name: Rysn Ftori
description: A Rosharan trader who becomes the Dawnshard and bonds the greatshell Chiri-Chiri.

name: Lopen
description: A Herdazian Windrunner of Bridge Four. Known for his humor, missing arm, and cheerful disposition.

name: Auxiliary
description: A sentient spren bonded to Nomad, capable of becoming various weapons and tools.

name: Denth
description: A mercenary captain on Nalthis. Charming and deadly, with a mysterious past tied to Kalad's Phantoms.

name: Blushweaver
description: A Returned goddess of the Court of Gods. Bold, strategic, and fiercely independent.

name: Yumi
description: A yoki-hijo from Komashi who stacks stones for her people, trapped in a strange curse that swaps her world.

name: Jezrien
description: Herald of Kings. Patron of the Windrunners. His Honorblade grants the Surges of Adhesion and Gravitation.

name: Ishar
description: Herald of the Bondsmiths. The most dangerous of the Heralds, known for his madness and manipulation of Connection.

name: Kalak
description: Herald of the Willshapers. One of the ten Heralds of the Almighty who founded the Oathpact.

name: Chanarach
description: Herald of the Dustbringers. Little is known of her among modern Rosharans.

name: Pailiah
description: Herald of the Truthwatchers. Patron of the Order of Truthwatchers.

name: Battar
description: Herald of the Elsecallers. Her current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Vedel
description: Herald of the Edgedancers. Patron of the Order of Edgedancers.

name: Nikaro (Painter)
description: A nightmare painter from Komashi tasked with sealing nightmarish entities with his art.

name: Sylphrena (Syl)
description: An honorspren bonded to Kaladin. She serves as his spren and partner as a Knight Radiant of the Windrunners.

name: Teft
description: A former soldier turned bridgeman and Knight Radiant of the Windrunners. Mentor to Kaladin and a member of Bridge Four.

name: Rock (Numuhukumakiaki'aialunamor)
description: A Horneater bridgeman turned chef. Known for his humor, cooking, and deep connection to the Unkalaki traditions.

name: Moash (Vyre)
description: A former bridgeman who becomes Odium's champion. Once a friend of Kaladin, he eventually embraces his role as Vyre, a servant of Odium.

name: Dabbid
description: A silent bridgeman from Bridge Four. Though unable to speak, he shows remarkable loyalty and resourcefulness during the occupation of Urithiru.

name: Rlain
description: A listener scout who joins Bridge Four. The only listener remaining in Urithiru, he becomes a Truthwatcher and a bridge between humans and singers.

name: Raboniel (Lady of Wishes)
description: A Fused scholar and commander who leads the occupation of Urithiru. She seeks a way to end the cycle of war between humans and singers.

name: Eshonai
description: A listener explorer and warleader who discovered the shattered plains and sought a peaceful future for her people. Former Shardbearer and Willshaper.

name: Gavilar Kholin
description: The late king of Alethkar, father of Dalinar and Elhokar. His assassination by Szeth set the events of the Stormlight Archive in motion.

name: Breeze
description: A Soother and member of Kelsier's crew. Known for his elegant demeanor and ability to manipulate emotions through Allomancy.

name: Hammond (Ham)
description: A Pewterarm and member of Kelsier's crew. A philosopher at heart who questions the morality of the crew's actions while fighting for the skaa.

name: Dockson
description: The organizational mastermind of Kelsier's crew. He manages logistics and finances for the rebellion against the Lord Ruler.

name: Clubs (Mennis)
description: A Smoker and member of Kelsier's crew. His Allomantic coppercloud hides the crew's activities from Inquisitors and obligators.

name: Tindwyl
description: A Feruchemist of the Synod who trains Elend Venture to be a proper leader. A Terris elder known for her wisdom and stern demeanor.

name: Straff Venture
description: The high noble lord of House Venture and father of Elend. A powerful Allomancer and one of the most dangerous men in Luthadel.

name: Zane
description: Straff Venture's Mistborn son, secretly working for the Lord Ruler. Tormented by a voice in his head, he becomes an unpredictable player in the siege of Luthadel.

name: Miles Dagouter (Miles Hundredlives)
description: A Twinborn bounty hunter with steel Allomancy and gold Feruchemy. His Compounding healing makes him nearly immortal. A religious zealot targeting corrupt nobles.

name: Telsin Ladrian
description: Waxillium's sister and the leader of the Set. She opposes Harmony and works to free Scadrial from his influence.

name: Galladon
description: An Elantrian from Sel. Survived the Shaod and guided Raoden through Elantris. His stoic demeanor masks deep loyalty and wisdom.

name: Dilaf
description: A Fjordell priest and leader of the Dakhor monks. A fanatical follower of Wulfden the Fourth who seeks to destroy Elantris and its people.

name: Parlin
description: Siri's cousin and Idrian guard. A loyal but reluctant soldier assigned to protect Siri during her journey to T'Telir.

name: Baon
description: A Darksider mercenary from Taldain and member of Khriss's expedition to Dayside. Skilled in combat and knowledgeable about Sand Mastery.

name: Ais
description: A Dayside Taldain woman and leader of the Lady Masks. She aids Khriss's expedition across the Deep Desert.

name: Demoux
description: A general in the armies of the Final Empire and later a member of the Seventeenth Shard. One of Kelsier's original crew and a loyal ally of Elend Venture.

name: Sixth of the Dusk
description: A trapper from First of the Sun. Uses Aviar to survive the dangerous jungles of his homeworld. Later meets off-worlders and becomes involved in larger Cosmere events.

name: Vathi
description: A scholar from First of the Sun who studies the Aviar and the Pantheon. She accompanies Sixth of the Dusk on expeditions.

name: The Cinder King
description: The tyrannical ruler of Canticle who uses Torment bonds to control the planet's population. He endlessly pursues the sun across the scorched world.

name: Fort
description: A thick-browed foxlike alien from the planet UTol who joins Nomad on his journey. Consumed by a desire for vengeance against the Night Brigade.

name: Kokerlii
description: A small squat humanoid alien from the planet UTol. A traveling companion of Nomad who provides comic relief and moral support.
